nasb.text: In that day the Lord will take away the beauty of their anklets, headbands, crescent ornaments,

esv.text: In that day the Lord will take away the finery of the anklets, the headbands, and the crescents;

cnv.text: 到那日，主必除掉她們華美的腳釧、髮網、月牙圈、

ccb.text: 到那日，主必拿去她们美丽的脚镯、发饰、项链、

csbs.text: 到那日，主必除掉她们精美的脚镯、发网、月牙项圈、
